category_sources: source_facts.description calls it a Git repository organizer and rebase workflow automation tool; official docs describe branch workflow automation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official documentation title both use git-machete.
docs_sources: Dedicated official Read the Docs site for git-machete documentation.

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe Git branch organization, rebase/merge workflow automation, and command-line usage.
